DEMAND FOR JURY FILED; JURY TRIAL SET; NOTICE MAILED FILED BY DEFENDANT MCGEE, BRUCE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-31-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01
JUDGE WICK, B. FIELDS, REPORTER C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGEE, BRUCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1151 POST ST, #10, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT IN SUM OF $1000.00; (SEE FILE FOR DETAIL).
